'''âzh-zh-h''' ('''kazhazhah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weare|weare]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weare|weare]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-zh-h
|-
! Lemma
| kazhazhah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhazhah|thizhazhah]] || [[word:jizhazhah|jizhazhah]] || [[word:shizhazhah|shizhazhah]] || [[word:kizhazhah|kizhazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhazhah|thuthuzhazhah]] || [[word:jujuzhazhah|jujuzhazhah]] || [[word:shushuzhazhah|shushuzhazhah]] || [[word:kukuzhazhah|kukuzhazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhazhah|thuzhazhah]] || [[word:juzhazhah|juzhazhah]] || [[word:shuzhazhah|shuzhazhah]] || [[word:kuzhazhah|kuzhazhah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhazhah|thuzhazhah]] || [[word:juzhazhah|juzhazhah]] || [[word:shuzhazhah|shuzhazhah]] || [[word:kuzhazhah|kuzhazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhazhah|thezhazhah]] || [[word:jezhazhah|jezhazhah]] || [[word:shezhazhah|shezhazhah]] || [[word:kezhazhah|kezhazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhazhah|thothozhazhah]] || [[word:jojozhazhah|jojozhazhah]] || [[word:shoshozhazhah|shoshozhazhah]] || [[word:kokozhazhah|kokozhazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhazhah|thozhazhah]] || [[word:jozhazhah|jozhazhah]] || [[word:shozhazhah|shozhazhah]] || [[word:kozhazhah|kozhazhah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhazhah|thozhazhah]] || [[word:jozhazhah|jozhazhah]] || [[word:shozhazhah|shozhazhah]] || [[word:kozhazhah|kozhazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhazhah|thĂŠzhazhah]] || [[word:jĂŠzhazhah|jĂŠzhazhah]] || [[word:shĂŠzhazhah|shĂŠzhazhah]] || [[word:kĂŠzhazhah|kĂŠzhazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhazhah|thathazhazhah]] || [[word:jajazhazhah|jajazhazhah]] || [[word:shashazhazhah|shashazhazhah]] || [[word:kakazhazhah|kakazhazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhazhah|thazhazhah]] || [[word:jazhazhah|jazhazhah]] || [[word:shazhazhah|shazhazhah]] || [[word:kazhazhah|kazhazhah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhazhah|thazhazhah]] || [[word:jazhazhah|jazhazhah]] || [[word:shazhazhah|shazhazhah]] || [[word:kazhazhah|kazhazhah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhazhah|shazhazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhazhah|goshazhazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhazhah|gokishazhazhah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhahnĂŒ|shazhazhahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnknĂŒ|goshazhazhahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahnĂŒ|gokishazhazhahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhazhahshĂ«|shazhazhahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkshĂ«|goshazhazhahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahshĂ«|gokishazhazhahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhahro|shazhazhahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkro|goshazhazhahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahro|gokishazhazhahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhahmu|shazhazhahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkmu|goshazhazhahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahmu|gokishazhazhahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhazhahsher|shazhazhahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnksher|goshazhazhahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahsher|gokishazhazhahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhazhahng|shazhazhahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkng|goshazhazhahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahng|gokishazhazhahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhazhahya|shazhazhahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkya|goshazhazhahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahya|gokishazhazhahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhazhahyam|shazhazhahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkyam|goshazhazhahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahyam|gokishazhazhahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazhahnĂŒshĂ«|shazhazhahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhazhahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhazhahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhahnĂŒro|shazhazhahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnknĂŒro|goshazhazhahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahnĂŒro|gokishazhazhahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhahnĂŒmu|shazhazhahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnknĂŒmu|goshazhazhahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahnĂŒmu|gokishazhazhahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhahshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhazhahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhazhahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhazhahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhahshĂ«ro|shazhazhahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkshĂ«ro|goshazhazhahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahshĂ«ro|gokishazhazhahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhahshĂ«mu|shazhazhahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkshĂ«mu|goshazhazhahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahshĂ«mu|gokishazhazhahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhahronĂŒ|shazhazhahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkronĂŒ|goshazhazhahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahronĂŒ|gokishazhazhahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazhahroshĂ«|shazhazhahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkroshĂ«|goshazhazhahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahroshĂ«|gokishazhazhahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazhahromu|shazhazhahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkromu|goshazhazhahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahromu|gokishazhazhahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazhahmunĂŒ|shazhazhahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkmunĂŒ|goshazhazhahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahmunĂŒ|gokishazhazhahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazhahmushĂ«|shazhazhahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkmushĂ«|goshazhazhahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahmushĂ«|gokishazhazhahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazhahmuro|shazhazhahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazhahnkmuro|goshazhazhahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazhahmuro|gokishazhazhahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
